zh.lifeSummary: 當Teobaldo di Visconti於1230年出生在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾時，他的父親Lord Obizzo Visconti of Invorium26歲，母親Fiorina Mandelli26歲。他於1248年與Anastasia Pirovano在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1276年1月10日在義大利托斯卡納阿瑞左享年46歲，埋葬在義大利托斯卡納阿瑞左。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Teobaldo di Visconti于1230年出生在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾时，他的父亲Lord Obizzo Visconti of Invorium26岁，母亲Fiorina Mandelli26岁。他于1248年与Anastasia Pirovano在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1276年1月10日在意大利托斯卡納阿瑞左享年46岁，埋葬在意大利托斯卡納阿瑞左。

nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Visconti
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Pasquale, Rocco, Umberto, Amerigo, Angelo, Carlo, Domenic, Ennio, Gaetano, Gerlando, Gino.  French Laurent, Camille, Girard.

Italian: from visconte, a title of rank (medieval Latin vicecomes ‘deputy of a count’). Unusually (since most noble families took their surnames from their estates), the surname was sometimes of literal application, but without doubt it is also in part a nickname for someone who gave himself airs and graces, and in part a metonymic occupational name for someone in the employ of a viscount. This surname is also found in southern France.

variants.name: Viscomi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Emilio, Salvatore, Antonio, Beniamino, Filomena, Mario, Rodolfo, Santo.
Italian: Sicilian and Calabrian form of Visconti , from medieval Latin viscomes ‘deputy’, Greek biskōmēs.

en.lifeSummary: When Teobaldo di Visconti was born in 1230, in Milano, Milan, Lombardy, Italy, his father, Lord Obizzo Visconti of Invorium, was 26 and his mother, Fiorina Mandelli, was 26. He married Anastasia Pirovano in 1248, in Milano, Milan, Lombardy, Italy. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 10 January 1276, in Arezzo, Tuscany, Italy, at the age of 46, and was buried in Arezzo, Tuscany, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Teobaldo di Visconti est né en 1230, à Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italie, son père, Lord Obizzo Visconti of Invorium, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Fiorina Mandelli, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Anastasia Pirovano en 1248, à Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 10 janvier 1276, à Arezzo, Toscana, Italie, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Arezzo, Toscana, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Teobaldo di Visconti 1230 in Milano, Milano, Lombardei, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Obizzo Visconti of Invorium 26 und seine Mutter Fiorina Mandelli 26. Er hat 1248 in Milano, Milano, Lombardei, Italien Anastasia Pirovano geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Januar 1276 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Arezzo, Toscana, Italien und wurde in Arezzo, Toscana, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Teobaldo di Visconti è nato il nel 1230 nel Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia, il suo padre, Lord Obizzo Visconti of Invorium, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Fiorina Mandelli, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Anastasia Pirovano nel 1248, nel Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 10 gennaio 1276, nel Arezzo, Toscana, Italia, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Arezzo, Toscana, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Teobaldo di Viscontiが1230年にイタリアロンバーディアミラノミラノで生まれた時，父Lord Obizzo Visconti of Invoriumは26歳，母Fiorina Mandelliは26歳であった。1248年にイタリアロンバーディアミラノミラノでAnastasia Pirovanoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1276年1月10日にイタリアトスカナアレズゾで46歳で死去し，イタリアトスカナアレズゾにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Teobaldo di Visconti(이)가 1230년 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오 미랜오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Obizzo Visconti of Invorium(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Fiorina Mandelli(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1248년 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오 미랜오에서 Anastasia Pirovano(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1276년 1월 10일 이탈리아 토스캔아 애레즈오에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 토스캔아 애레즈오에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Teobaldo di Visconti nasceu em 1230, em Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Itália, seu pai, Lord Obizzo Visconti of Invorium, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Fiorina Mandelli, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Anastasia Pirovano em 1248, em Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1276, em Arezzo, Toscana, Itália, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Arezzo, Toscana, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Teobaldo di Visconti родился в 1230 г. в местности милано, милано, ломбардя, Италия, его отцу по имени Lord Obizzo Visconti of Invorium было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Fiorina Mandelli, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Anastasia Pirovano в 1248 г. в местности милано, милано, ломбардя, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 10 января 1276 г. в местности ареззо, тоскана, Италия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности ареззо, тоскана, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Teobaldo di Visconti nació en 1230, en Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia, su papá, Lord Obizzo Visconti of Invorium, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Fiorina Mandelli, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Anastasia Pirovano en 1248, en Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 10 de enero de 1276, en Arezzo, Toscana, Italia, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Arezzo, Toscana, Italia.
